name: Enjoy Dog Treats - Mini Bones Baked & Dried Biscuits 250g
description: Enjoy Dog Treats - Mini Bones Baked & Dried Biscuits , reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. INGREDIENTS: cereals, meat & animal by-products, glucose (6.2%), vegetable oils & fats, minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 10.2 Oil Content (%) - 5.5 Crude Ash (%) - 3.6 Crude Fiber (%) - 2.6 Sodium (%) - 0.5 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Feed maximum of 10 pieces per day. Recommended for all dogs. Feed as a snack or treat between meals. This product does not replace full-dog food daily. Once open, keep package tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place.
